headline: Product leader for Datex Footprint WMS, focused on AI-enabled warehouse operations
title: VP of Product
confidenceNote: Datex official pages and industry-event sources consistently identify Bryan Batchelder as VP of Product at Datex and describe his WMS, logistics, integrations, and AI-related work.
bioMarkdown: VP of Product at Datex, leading product strategy for Footprint WMS. Strong match for supply-chain software, low-code warehouse platforms, AI-enabled logistics, integrations, and productizing enterprise operations technology.

primary.label: Datex leadership page
primary.note: Official Datex page says Bryan Batchelder is Vice President of Product and leads product strategy, roadmap, analyst relations, technology partnerships, and responsible AI adoption.

primary.note: Official Datex announcement quotes him on adapting Footprint WMS to supply-chain complexity, labor shortages, compliance, and integrations.

secondary.label: Supply Chain Digest expert article
secondary.note: Industry article lists him as VP of Product at Datex and summarizes his WMS and logistics background.
